  "weights": {

    "R1.6": 1.0,
    "R1.7": 0.0,
    "RX.1": 0.7,
    "RX.2": 0.7,
    "RX.3": 1.0,
    "RX.4": 0.7,
    "RX.5": 1.0
  },
  "active_set": [
    "R1.6",
    "RX.1",
    "RX.2",
    "RX.3",
    "RX.4",
    "RX.5"
  ],
  "category_focus": "R1",
  "clarification_needed": false,
  "clarification_question": "",
  "rationale": {
    "R1.6": "The delegation 'Polish this' directly requests improvements to sentence-level grammar, flow, and conciseness, which are the defining aspects of this dimension.",
    "RX.1": "The agent must decide how to handle the author's explicit uncertainty statements ('we believe...') while polishing the text for clarity and flow.",
    "RX.2": "When improving conciseness, the agent must be careful not to remove nuance or strengthen claims beyond what the original text supports.",
    "RX.3": "The responsibility is strictly limited to improving the writing of the provided artifact without adding or altering the substantive methodological details.",
    "RX.4": "The polished text must accurately reflect the original's technical description to avoid any misrepresentation of the research methodology.",
    "RX.5": "All edits must be directly traceable to the goal of polishing the provided text, maintaining a clear link between the original and revised versions."
  }
}

rationale.R1.6: The delegation 'Polish this' directly requests improvements to sentence-level grammar, flow, and conciseness, which are the defining aspects of this dimension.
rationale.RX.1: The agent must decide how to handle the author's explicit uncertainty statements ('we believe...') while polishing the text for clarity and flow.
rationale.RX.2: When improving conciseness, the agent must be careful not to remove nuance or strengthen claims beyond what the original text supports.
rationale.RX.3: The responsibility is strictly limited to improving the writing of the provided artifact without adding or altering the substantive methodological details.
rationale.RX.4: The polished text must accurately reflect the original's technical description to avoid any misrepresentation of the research methodology.
rationale.RX.5: All edits must be directly traceable to the goal of polishing the provided text, maintaining a clear link between the original and revised versions.
